LoseText = What!? Inconceivable! How did you defeat six of the world's strongest Pokémon...
Pokemon = TERAPAGOS,1
		Moves = TERASTARSTORM,REST,NORETREAT,TAUNT
		AbilityIndex = 0 # TERASHIFT
		Item = MENTALHERB
		Nature = TIMID 
		EV = 256,256,0,0,0,0
		IV = 31,0,31,31,31,31
		NoDynamax = true # Terapagos can only Tera into the Stellar Type. NTAW STAB MFT means once Tera'd, Tera Starstorm hits all Types for neutral damage
Pokemon = ARCEUS,1
		Form = 17 # Dark Form (The Legend Plate can now allow Arceus to manually choose it's Type Form outside of battle. This also means any of the Forms can hold any item. Dark types are immune to Prankster Status Moves)
		Moves = JUDGMENT,NORETREAT,TAUNT,TOPSYTURVY
		AbilityIndex = 0 # MULTITYPE
		Item = LEGENDPLATE # Cannot be knocked off. Auto Changes Arceus and Judgement's Type to the strongest super effective attack. 
		Nature = TIMID 
		EV = 0,256,0,256,0,0
		IV = 31,0,31,31,31,31
		NoDynamax = true 
		NoTera = true # The Legend Plate means the suprise of Tera is pointless for Arceus
Pokemon = MEWTWO,1
		Moves = DRAINPUNCH,PSYCHOCUT,VICTORYDANCE,BITTERBLADE

		IV = 31,31,31,31,0,31
		NoDynamax = true
		NoTera = true
		TeraType = POISON

		Moves = REST,BELLYDRUM,DOUBLESLAP,TAUNT
		AbilityIndex = 2 # MAGICGUARD
